heading: Visitor center
label: 410aaa–28 Visitor center
notes: “Secretary” Definedprovided in part that in this subchapter “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.Section 103 of Pub. L. 103–433

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary may acquire not more than 5 acres of land and interests in land, and improvements on the land and interests, outside the boundaries of the park, in the unincorporated village of Joshua Tree, for the purpose of operating a visitor center.

children.heading: Boundary
children.label: b Boundary
children.text: The Secretary shall modify the boundary of the park to include the land acquired under this section as a noncontiguous parcel.
may include the property owned (as of ) by the Joshua Tree National Park Association and commonly referred to as the “Joshua Tree National Park Visitor Center”;March 12, 2019
shall be administered by the Secretary as part of the park; and
may be acquired only with the consent of the owner, by donation, purchase with donated or appropriated funds, or exchange.
